---
title: "07. 最小公设、最少破坏与最优保真"
subtitle: "Minimal Axioms, Minimal Damage, and Optimal Fidelity"
date: 2026-04-10
order: 7
categories: [synthesis, cultural, omega]
description: "Cross-text synthesis essay tracing `scanError_hasCertificate` across 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本."
---

**主定理核 / Primary Lean Anchor:** `scanError_hasCertificate`  
**覆盖文本 / Works:** 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本

{{< include articles/synthesis_07_rate_distortion.md >}}

---

[Back to Synthesis Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
